items.title: Avengers reassemble and Top Gun flies back - Hollywood studios preview their new movies
items.dek: Some of the most hotly anticipated new films of the next couple of years are previewed at CinemaCon.
items.body: Some of the most hotly anticipated new films of the next couple of years are previewed at CinemaCon.

items.title: Three charged with arson on Persian media offices in London
items.dek: Two teenagers and a 21-year-old man are due in court charged with arson with intent to endanger life.
items.body: Two teenagers and a 21-year-old man are due in court charged with arson with intent to endanger life.

items.title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
items.dek: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.
items.body: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.
